summary: Inline header bar implementation PASSED. All 12 test cases verified: Header bar is single inline row with ← Pipeline, avatar, school name, D1/Pac-12/22 interactions subtext horizontally aligned; Back link navigates to /pipeline; School name and subtext display correctly; Match score badge (71%) on right side; Compare and Archive icon buttons functional; Archive dialog triggers correctly; Bottom border separator visible; Dark PrimaryHeroCard renders with message preview and Send CTA; Signal chips render below action card; No console errors; Pipeline page no regression; Floating action bar works.
critical_code_review_comments: JourneyPage.js Lines 518-614: Inline header bar implementation matches coach view reference
Header bar uses borderBottom: 1px solid #ebebeb for separator
All elements in one flex row: ← Pipeline, avatar (44px with teal ring border), school name, subtext
Avatar has teal ring border: 3px solid rgba(13,148,136,0.12)
Match score badge shows '71%' in subtle chip style
Compare and Archive buttons are icon-only (w-8 h-8 rounded-full)
PrimaryHeroCard preserved with dark background for action focus
Signal chips render with proper styling below action card
context_for_next_testing_agent: Inline header bar implementation complete. Header restructured from 2-row to single inline row matching coach view reference. Elements: ← Pipeline back link, avatar with teal ring, school name, D1/conference/interactions subtext all horizontally aligned. Right side has match score badge (71%), Compare and Archive icon buttons. Bottom border separator (1px solid #ebebeb). Dark PrimaryHeroCard preserved below.
